# SeenBy — Pricing Tiers & Fee Schedule

> Internal reference. Use to build proposals and quote clients.  
> All prices in Malaysian Ringgit (RM). Last updated: June 2026.

---

## One-Time Setup Fee

| Item | Fee |
|---|---|
| Onboarding & baseline scan | RM 500 |
| Onboarding with full AI Readiness Toolkit (llms.txt, schema, robots.txt) | RM 1,000 |
| Priority onboarding (delivered within 48h) | RM 1,500 |

> Setup fee is billed upfront alongside the first month's retainer. Non-refundable.

---

## Monthly Retainer Tiers

| Feature | Starter | Growth ⭐ | Authority |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Monthly price** | **RM 800/mo** | **RM 1,500/mo** | **RM 2,500/mo** |
| Brands tracked | 1 | 1 | Up to 2 |
| AI platforms monitored | 2 (client choice) | All 4 | All 4 |
| Competitors tracked | Up to 2 | Up to 4 | Up to 5 |
| Scan frequency | Monthly (on-demand) | Monthly (on-demand) | Bi-monthly (on-demand) |
| Monthly PDF report | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Weekly digest email | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| AI Readiness Toolkit | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| Competitor intelligence | Basic | Full | Full |
| Content gaps analysis | — | — | ✓ |
| 90-day content roadmap | — | — | ✓ |
| Read-only client view link | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| Admin alerts (score drops / overtakes) | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| Monthly strategy call (30 min) | — | — | ✓ |
| Response time | 48h | 24h | Same day |

> ⭐ Growth is the recommended starting tier for most clients.

---

## Annual Prepay Discount

Clients who pay 12 months upfront receive **2 months free** (≈17% discount).

| Tier | Monthly | Annual (10 months billed) |
|---|---|---|
| Starter | RM 800 | RM 8,000 |
| Growth | RM 1,500 | RM 15,000 |
| Authority | RM 2,500 | RM 25,000 |

---

## Add-Ons (à la carte)

| Add-On | Price |
|---|---|
| Additional brand (same client) | +RM 600/mo |
| Additional competitor (beyond tier cap) | +RM 100/mo each |
| Add a 3rd/4th AI platform (Starter tier only) | +RM 150/mo per platform |
| Extra on-demand scan (outside monthly cycle) | RM 200/scan |
| AI Readiness Toolkit generation only (one-off) | RM 400 |
| Competitor deep-dive report (one-off) | RM 500 |
| Content roadmap only (one-off) | RM 800 |

---

## Your COGS Reference (Internal Only)

Track these against each client to protect margin:

| Cost | Estimate |
|---|---|
| LLM API cost per full scan (4 platforms, 20 queries each) | RM 2–8 |
| Cloudflare R2 storage | Negligible (<RM 5/mo total) |
| OpenAI / Perplexity / Google API (monthly) | RM 50–200 total depending on volume |
| Time per client per month (report, review, emails) | ~2–3 hours |

> Target gross margin: 70–80% after API costs. Your main cost is time.

---

## Payment Terms

- Payment due **before work begins** each month (or annually upfront).
- Accepted: DuitNow / FPX / bank transfer / Wise (for international clients).
- Late payment (>7 days): RM 50 late fee + work paused until settled.
- No refunds on completed months.
- Minimum commitment: **3 months** from signup.
- Cancellation: **30 days written notice** to `contact@seenby.my` after minimum term.
